name: Shaurya Select SBI Card

rewards.displayCategory: Canteen Stores Department (CSD) military canteens, dining, movies, departmental stores, and grocery spends

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year (limited to 1 visit per quarter).

exclusions: transactions excluded under SBI Card reward terms

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 1,500 renewal bonus Reward Points worth Rs 375

renewalBenefits: 1,500 renewal bonus Reward Points on payment of annual fee

milestones.label: Rs 500 Pizza Hut e-gift voucher on spends of Rs 50,000 in a calendar quarter
Rs 7,000 Yatra or Pantaloons e-gift voucher on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh

milestoneBenefits: Pizza Hut e-gift voucher worth Rs 500 on quarterly spends of Rs 50,000
Yatra or Pantaloons e-gift voucher worth Rs 7,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
additionalBenefits: Personal accident insurance cover of Rs 10 lakh, subject to policy terms
Card can be embossed with service branch name (Army, Navy, Air Force, or Paramilitary)
1% fuel surcharge waiver at petrol pumps in India on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

salaried: Designed for eligible defence, paramilitary and related service personnel
selfEmployed: Designed for eligible defence, paramilitary and related service personnel
